PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, KATHRYN A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX, CHARLES C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILEY, KATHRYN A. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.00, DEFENDANT KATHRYN A. WILEY NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
